title: PATIKIL Push Pull Door Sign, 1 Set 2"x5" PVC Self-Adhesive Waterproof Vertical Pull Push Sticker Sign for Business Office Store Shop Glass Door, Silver
features: Size: 12.7 x 5 cm / 5 x 1.97 inch (L*W); Color: Silver/Black

Advantage: Made of durable PVC material, waterproof and wear-resistant, easy to clean and can be used for a long time; Clear text is good enough to read from a distance, preventing guests from being confused about the sliding direction of the door; Adhesive-backed design can adhere well to smooth glass door surfaces for easy application and strong adhesion.
Instruction: Easy to use, just tear off the sticker on the back of the sign and stick it on a flat and smooth door surface.

Application: This door sign is convenient for you to distinguish the push door and the sliding door in the entrance passage, effectively preventing you from confuse the sliding direction of the door and avoiding hitting the door. Widely used in offices, convenience stores, commercial shops, cafes, supermarkets, etc.
Note: Please note that the label needs to be attached to a smooth and clean door surface.
